verification.note: Reported by the WirelessJEPA authors (arXiv:2601.20190): '500-shot linear probe, GNSS Jamming 6-class (Zenodo-synthesized), 63.1%' (docs/DOWNSTREAM_TASKS.md P2/interference_id). Tagged from_paper_uncertain because we could NOT confirm the paper's Zenodo GNSS-jamming source is the same release as our board's interf_gnss6 dataset (Swinney & Woods 2021, Zenodo record 4629685) nor that any split/index would match ours -- only the task description (raw-IQ, 6-class GNSS jamming) and class count line up. Do not read this as an AMC-grade citation; see docs/BIBLIOGRAPHY.md A.5.
